rootCause: Quest dialogue completable validation only required a graph path to finish. It did not assert that specific high-risk nodes had a non-process escape route, so `composting/turn-pile` node `moisture` shipped with only a process action and could trap players when that action was unavailable.
resolution: Added a CI regression test that requires `composting/turn-pile` node `moisture` to include a non-process fallback (`goto: mix`), updated the quest node with that fallback option, and added a completion reward (compost sifter) so the quest has meaningful progression incentives.
